title: Pensar
description: Pensar uses context-based code analysis to find and remediate Agentic AI security risks in AI agent applications - protecting against issues such as unverified tool use, memory mismanagement, or unintended agentic behaviors during development.

items: Perform SAST/DAST on agent planning code, tool wrappers, & plugin interfaces.
Harden agent loop logic against infinite loops, unsafe function routing, & unauthorized self-modification.
